name: Manifestation Of Spirits

spell.name: Manifestation Of Spirits
spell.access: Rivethun priests and shamans or those who have a close relationship with such individuals.

heightened.text: You can target up to 5 creatures.

spell.success: The target believes every spirit it sees is an imminent threat. It’s stupefied 3 for 1 round.
spell.failure: As success, but the effect lasts 1 minute.
spell.critical_failure: As failure, and the target becomes confused for 1 round.

text: You open the target’s eyes to the plethora of spirits surrounding it—and it sees all these spirits as menacing and powerful. The target must attempt a Will save.
